privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openc3_cosmos_env empirical_limit_calibration_routine task. Verified that the task uses the built-in synthetic "INST" simulation target in OpenC3 COSMOS. All metadata parameters (target "INST", item "TEMP3", margins 0.2 and 0.4, fallback span 5.0) and output paths strictly match the task instructions, setup logger script, export script, and verifier.py mathematical logic.
